scenarios.description: throws IllegalArgumentException when visitor is null (Validate.notNull r0 == null)
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = null; Node root = new Element("div");

scenarios.description: throws IllegalArgumentException when root is null (Validate.notNull r1 == null)
visits single root node with no children (no descend, immediate tail then return)
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called once with (root,0); visitor.tail called once with (root,0)
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("p"); NodeVisitor visitor = spy visitor recording calls;

scenarios.description: descends one level: root with one child invokes head/tail in depth-first order
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); root.appendChild(new Element("span")); NodeVisitor visitor = recorder;

scenarios.description: handles multiple siblings: root with two children visits siblings sequentially
scenarios.expectedResult: calls: head(root,0), head(child1,1), tail(child1,1), head(child2,1), tail(child2,1), tail(root,0)
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("ul"); root.appendChild(new Element("li")); root.appendChild(new Element("li")); NodeVisitor visitor = recorder;

scenarios.description: replaces node in head: visitor.head replaces node content but keeps siblingIndex (replacement path)
scenarios.precondition: visitor.head performs node.replaceWith(new Node) preserving siblingIndex; original child has no children
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.head called once; traversal continues on replaced node then returns
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = (n,d)->{ if(n==child) n.replaceWith(new Element("a")); };
assert visitor.head called on original child and on replacement; visitor.tail called on replacement;

scenarios.description: removes node in head: visitor.head removes node completely (removal path)
scenarios.expectedResult: visitor.tail never called for removed node; traversal skips removed node and returns
pseudocode: Element root = new Element("div"); Element child = new Element("span"); root.appendChild(child); NodeVisitor visitor = (n,d)->{ if(n==child) n.remove(); };
assert visitor.head called on child; no tail(child) call; tail(root) called once;

scenarios.description: throws IllegalArgumentException when Element list is null (Validate.notNull elements == null)
iterates zero elements when Elements is empty (for-loop 0 iterations)
pseudocode: NodeVisitor visitor = (n,d)->{}; Elements els = new Elements();

scenarios.description: iterates one element in list (for-loop 1 iteration)
pseudocode: Element el = new Element("p"); Elements els = new Elements(el); NodeVisitor visitor = recorder;

scenarios.description: iterates multiple elements in list (for-loop N>1 iterations)
scenarios.expectedResult: invokes traverse(visitor, each element) in order twice
pseudocode: Element e1 = new Element("a"), e2=new Element("b"); Elements els = new Elements(e1,e2); NodeVisitor visitor = recorder;
assert sequence of headCalls starts with head(e1,0) then head(e2,0);
